description: Composition:Black floaters with white and yellow strap detailing, synthetic upper with foam padded lining, cushioned EVA footbed, forefoot, midfoot strap and closure backAction:An ideal trek footwear and for casual outings, these sheek black sandals from puma look all the more trendy with the white and yellow lined straps. Water resistant and durable rubber outsoles make this pair of floaters give your feet that much needed grip and comfort.
